title: suregada boiviniana var. boiviniana
intro: Suregada boiviniana var. boiviniana, also known as the Boivin's Surian or Boivin's Suregada, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Suregada boiviniana var. boiviniana are believed to provide several health benefits, including the relief of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as the treatment of digestive problems and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions or infusions for internal use, and it is also used topically in the form of ointments or creams for wound healing and skin conditions.
